description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, these shoes work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsBallet shoes with stitch detail and a mifdoot strap with elastication at the sidesPadded footbed with perforationsTPU outsole with floral lugs and an upraised heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
